basic_details.job_title: DCPU Vaishali Support Person Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Child Protection Unit Vaishali (DCPU Vaishali)
basic_details.short_information: The District Child Protection Unit Vaishali (DCPU Vaishali) has officially announced the Support Person Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published at vaishali.nic.in. Candidates aged between 30 and 65 years and holding a Postgraduate degree in Social Work (MSW), Sociology, Psychology, Child Development, Law, or a Graduate degree with a Diploma in Child Rights/ Counselling can submit their offline applications on or before 14 July 2026. Direct links to download the official notification and the offline application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 30 years Maximum Age: 65 years Age as on 01 May 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Graduate in any discipline with Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling
qualification.details: Support Person: Post Graduate in Social Work (MSW)/Sociology/Psychology/Child Development or Law or Graduate in any discipline with Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling along with minimum three years work experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Vaishali Support Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://vaishali.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21 days from publication date (14 July 2026)
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Vaishali Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DCPU Vaishali Support Person Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for DCPU Vaishali Support Person Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://vaishali.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 21 days from publication date (14 July 2026) Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DCPU Vaishali Support Person Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the DCPU Vaishali Support Person Recruitment 2026 is 14-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Post Graduate degree in Social Work (MSW), Sociology, Psychology, Child Development, or Law, or a Graduate degree with a Diploma in Child Rights/Counselling.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Support Person position?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 30 years and the maximum age limit is 65 years as of 01 May 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Support Person role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 9000 per POCSO case.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the DCPU Vaishali Support Person vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by downloading the form from the official website and sending it to the address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the total number of vacancies for the Support Person post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Support Person post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the DCPU Vaishali Support Person recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DCPU Vaishali: https://vaishali.nic.in.
